title: podman shorthand flag for labels does not work
body:
I'm using `podman` 1.1.0

```
$ podman run --rm -l mylabel=myvalue -d busybox httpd -f
Error: unknown shorthand flag: 'l' in -l
```

but the documentation says

```
       --label, -l=[]

       Add metadata to a container (e.g., --label com.example.key=value)

```

comments.body:
I've tested the latest commit `4b80517b6a638ff06f8ad432f0f0f5839283d058`
and it works fine
